hero.badge: A development company that grows diligently every day
hero.subtitle1: onueldev turns brilliant ideas into reality.
hero.subtitle2: With trust and diligence, we move forward step by step.

about.label: About Us
about.desc_l1: onueldev is a studio that proves itself through skill.
about.desc_l2: Like stars shining quietly in their own place in the universe,
about.desc_l3: built on the latest technologies and proven methodologies,
about.desc_l4: we find the balance between speed and quality — and deliver the best content.

services.label: Services
services.title: What Do We Build?
services.subtitle: Web, apps, games — these are the services onueldev designs and develops in-house.
services.web_desc: High-performance web applications using the latest frameworks. Responsive design delivers an optimized experience across all devices.
services.mobile_desc: Cross-platform iOS & Android app development. We maximize user satisfaction with native-level performance and intuitive UX.
services.ai_desc: We develop mobile games that deliver both fun and immersion. Using Unity and Godot Engine, we provide optimized gaming experiences on both iOS & Android platforms.
services.cloud_desc: Design and build stable, scalable cloud architecture. Maximize operational efficiency and deployment speed with DevOps automation.

tech.label: Tech Stack
tech.title: Technologies We Use
tech.subtitle: We combine proven technologies and modern tools to build optimal solutions.

process.label: Process
process.title: How Does It Work?
process.subtitle: We ensure project success through a systematic process.
process.step1_desc: We analyze market trends and user needs to define the direction of our ideas.
process.step2_desc: We design the system architecture and UI/UX. Wireframes and prototypes confirm direction and minimize risk.
process.step3_desc: We develop rapidly in an agile manner and test continuously. Code quality and performance are verified throughout the process.
process.step4_desc: We launch services with a stable deployment pipeline. Monitoring and rapid response maintain service stability.

contact.label: Contact
contact.title: Let's Start Together
contact.subtitle: Have an idea? Tell us about any project. We'll move forward together toward the stars.
contact.form_type_placeholder: Web development, mobile app, AI solution...
contact.form_message_placeholder: Tell us freely about your project.
